name: Feast of the Assumption (Gozo)
traditions: Elaborate street decorations; firework factories' displays; brass band marches; life-size religious statues; village feasts.
historicalBackground: Malta's village festas honor patron saints with fierce inter-village rivalry. The Assumption celebration in Gozo combines deep Catholic devotion with spectacular pyrotechnics.
description: Malta's most spectacular village festa, where Gozo erupts in fireworks, processions, and fervent devotion for the Assumption of Mary.
